# Codex DESIGN+DIFF review — I-p2-004 (#743): citation chip + resolver

HARD ITERATION CAP: 5. iter 3 (iter-2 P1: URL now non-interactive text in the tooltip popup). APPROVE iff zero P0/P1 (code + design rubric). Final line MERGE AUTHORIZED if mergeable. Canonical-diff-sha256 `7da8c88c3c75aba5e25e2c430210e2539385e3a1c22e4404b6eab17be072a47a`. web/ only.

## Design-audit note (component, no standalone page)
The chip has no page yet → its VISUAL renders in context on the report/Proof-Replay page (#756), where it'll get the full screenshot design audit. Here, audit: code correctness, the resolver no-synthetic-proof contract, and the chip's a11y/token usage from the code.

## Diff
- NEW web/lib/evidence_span.ts: resolveSpan(token, evidencePool) — parseProvenanceToken → sources.find(s=>s.source_id===id) (ARRAY) → full_text.slice(start,end) ONLY when source+full_text present AND 0<=start<=end<=len; else quote=null (honest, no clamp).
- NEW web/components/citation/citation_chip.tsx: base-ui Tooltip (hover+focus+touch+Esc), chip = tier-dot (--tier-1/2/3) + mono id/index, min 24px target, focus-visible ring /70; source card shows EXACT untruncated quote (max-h scroll) OR honest "span not renderable" fallback; Canada-red --primary url link.

## Review focus (rubric: provability/honesty, a11y, visual, code)
1. resolveSpan contract: array lookup + ALL null-guards correct (no synthetic partial proof)? matches the #756 inspector's future reuse?
2. chip a11y: hover AND focus AND touch open; 24px target; focus-visible; aria-label; no color-only (tier dot + text).
3. exact span untruncated (NOT the evidence-tooltip 240-char truncation)?
4. Any P0/P1 (incl. base-ui Tooltip needing a Provider ancestor at the consuming page — flag if so).

"C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe" -Command '$i=0; Get-Content -LiteralPath '"'web\\lib\\provenance_tokens.ts' | ForEach-Object { "'$i++; '"'{0,4}: {1}' -f "'$i, $_ }' in C:\POLARIS
 succeeded in 1075ms:
   1: // I-p2-004 (#743): the SINGLE shared resolver for provenance-token → exact
   2: // source span. Consumed by the citation chip now and by the Proof-Replay
   3: // inspector (#756) — one resolver boundary, no duplicate parsing.
   4: //
   5: // No-synthetic-proof contract (Codex brief iter-2/3): returns quote=null
   6: // (→ honest fallback) unless the bounds are fully valid against the actual
   7: // source body. NEVER a silently-clamped slice (that would be synthetic proof).
   8: 
   9: import { parseProvenanceToken } from "@/lib/provenance_tokens";
  10: 
  11: export interface EvidenceSource {
  12:   source_id: string;
  13:   full_text?: string | null;
  14:   snippet?: string | null;
  15:   title?: string | null;
  16:   url?: string | null;
  17:   tier?: string | number | null;
  18: }
  19: 
  20: export interface ResolvedSpan {
  21:   raw: string;
  22:   sourceId: string;
  23:   source: EvidenceSource | null;
  24:   start: number;
  25:   end: number;
  26:   /** The EXACT cited passage `full_text[start:end]`, or null when unresolved
  27:    * (missing source / no full_text / out-of-range bounds) — never clamped. */
  28:   quote: string | null;
  29: }
  30: 
  31: function sourcesOf(evidencePool: unknown): EvidenceSource[] {
  32:   const s = (evidencePool as { sources?: unknown } | null)?.sources;
  33:   return Array.isArray(s) ? (s as EvidenceSource[]) : [];
  34: }
  35: 
  36: /** Resolve a `[#ev:<id>:<start>-<end>]` token against the evidence pool.
  37:  * Returns null if the token itself is malformed; otherwise a ResolvedSpan
  38:  * whose `quote` is null unless every bound is valid against the real body. */
  39: export function resolveSpan(
  40:   token: string,
  41:   evidencePool: unknown,
  42: ): ResolvedSpan | null {
  43:   const parsed = parseProvenanceToken(token);
  44:   if (!parsed) return null;
  45:   // sources is an ARRAY → look up by source_id (never index).
  46:   const source =
  47:     sourcesOf(evidencePool).find((s) => s?.source_id === parsed.source_id) ??
  48:     null;
  49:   const body = source?.full_text ?? null; // exact span only from full_text
  50:   let quote: string | null = null;
  51:   if (
  52:     typeof body === "string" &&
  53:     body.length > 0 &&
  54:     parsed.start >= 0 &&
  55:     parsed.end <= body.length &&
  56:     parsed.start <= parsed.end
  57:   ) {
  58:     quote = body.slice(parsed.start, parsed.end);
  59:   }
  60:   return {
  61:     raw: token,
  62:     sourceId: parsed.source_id,
  63:     source,
  64:     start: parsed.start,
  65:     end: parsed.end,
  66:     quote,
  67:   };
  68: }

 succeeded in 1374ms:
   1: // I-p2-004 (#743): reusable citation chip + hover/focus source card.
   2: // Chip = inline provenance marker (tier dot + mono index/id). Hover OR focus OR
   3: // tap → source card with the EXACT cited span (untruncated) via resolveSpan.
   4: // No-synthetic-proof: shows the span only when resolved, else an honest note.
   5: "use client";
   6: 
   7: import { Tooltip } from "@base-ui/react/tooltip";
   8: import { useState } from "react";
   9: 
  10: import { resolveSpan } from "@/lib/evidence_span";
  11: 
  12: interface CitationChipProps {
  13:   /** A provenance token `[#ev:<id>:<start>-<end>]`. */
  14:   token: string;
  15:   /** The run's evidence pool (EvidenceContract / bundle.evidencePool). */
  16:   evidencePool: unknown;
  17:   /** Optional display index (e.g. the nth citation in a sentence). */
  18:   index?: number;
  19: }
  20: 
  21: function tierDotClass(tier: string | number | null | undefined): string {
  22:   const t = String(tier ?? "").toUpperCase();
  23:   if (t === "T1" || t === "1") return "bg-tier-1"; // primary evidence (red)
  24:   if (t === "T2" || t === "2") return "bg-tier-2";
  25:   return "bg-tier-3";
  26: }
  27: 
  28: export function CitationChip({
  29:   token,
  30:   evidencePool,
  31:   index,
  32: }: CitationChipProps) {
  33:   const span = resolveSpan(token, evidencePool);
  34:   const tier = span?.source?.tier ?? null;
  35:   const label = span?.source?.title ?? span?.sourceId ?? token;
  36:   // Controlled open so hover (mouse), focus (keyboard) AND tap (touch) all open
  37:   // the source card — base-ui hover alone is mouse-only (Codex iter-1 P1).
  38:   const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  39: 
  40:   return (
  41:     <Tooltip.Root open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  42:       <Tooltip.Trigger
  43:         closeOnClick={false}
  44:         render={
  45:           <button
  46:             type="button"
  47:             data-testid="citation-chip"
  48:             data-source-id={span?.sourceId}
  49:             aria-label={`Source: ${label}`}
  50:             onClick={() => setOpen((o) => !o)}
  51:             onMouseEnter={() => setOpen(true)}
  52:             onMouseLeave={() => setOpen(false)}
  53:             onFocus={() => setOpen(true)}
  54:             onBlur={() => setOpen(false)}
  55:             className="border-border text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted focus-visible:ring-ring/70 mx-0.5 inline-flex min-h-[24px] min-w-[24px] items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded border px-1.5 align-baseline font-mono text-[11px] leading-none transition-colors focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:outline-none"
  56:           />
  57:         }
  58:       >
  59:         <span
  60:           aria-hidden
  61:           className={`inline-block h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full ${tierDotClass(tier)}`}
  62:         />
  63:         {index != null ? index : (span?.sourceId ?? "ev")}
  64:       </Tooltip.Trigger>
  65:       <Tooltip.Portal>
  66:         <Tooltip.Positioner sideOffset={6}>
  67:           <Tooltip.Popup
  68:             data-testid="citation-source-card"
  69:             className="border-border bg-background text-foreground z-50 max-w-md rounded-md border p-3 shadow-md"
  70:           >
  71:             <div className="text-muted-foreground mb-1 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-[11px]">
  72:               <span className="text-foreground font-medium">{label}</span>
  73:               {tier != null && <span>· tier {String(tier)}</span>}
  74:               <span className="font-mono">
  75:                 [{span?.sourceId ?? "?"}:{span?.start ?? "?"}-{span?.end ?? "?"}
  76:                 ]
  77:               </span>
  78:             </div>
  79:             {span?.quote != null ? (
  80:               <blockquote className="text-foreground border-border max-h-48 overflow-auto border-l-2 pl-3 text-xs leading-snug italic">
  81:                 &ldquo;{span.quote}&rdquo;
  82:               </blockquote>
  83:             ) : (
  84:               <p className="text-muted-foreground text-xs">
  85:                 Source span not renderable from this bundle — verify via the
  86:                 signed bundle.
  87:               </p>
  88:             )}
  89:             {span?.source?.url && (
  90:               // Non-interactive provenance text: a tooltip popup must not hold
  91:               // interactive elements (unreachable on mouseleave + ARIA
  92:               // antipattern). The clickable "open source" lives in the full
  93:               // source card (#745) / Proof Replay (#756).
  94:               <p
  95:                 className="text-muted-foreground mt-1 max-w-full truncate text-[11px]"
  96:                 title={span.source.url}
  97:               >
  98:                 {span.source.url}
  99:               </p>
 100:             )}
 101:           </Tooltip.Popup>
 102:         </Tooltip.Positioner>
 103:       </Tooltip.Portal>
 104:     </Tooltip.Root>
 105:   );
 106: }

 succeeded in 1764ms:
   1: "use client";
   2: 
   3: import { Tooltip } from "@base-ui/react/tooltip";
   4: import * as React from "react";
   5: 
   6: interface EvidenceTooltipProps {
   7:   evidenceId: string;
   8:   sourceUrl?: string;
   9:   spanText?: string;
  10:   sourceTier?: string;
  11:   /**
  12:    * I-f6-001: optional publication-date string surfaced in the popup
  13:    * as `Published: <date>`. When undefined/null, the line is omitted.
  14:    */
  15:   publishedDate?: string | null;
  16:   /**
  17:    * I-f6-002: requested popup side. Default "top" (back-compat). Base UI
  18:    * Positioner applies flip+shift collision avoidance automatically when
  19:    * the requested side would clip the viewport.
  20:    */
  21:   side?: "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left";
  22:   /**
  23:    * I-f6-005: opt-in perf-test override. When defined, drives Tooltip.Root's
  24:    * `open` directly, bypassing the internal hover/focus/touch state machine.
  25:    * Default `undefined` → no behavior change for existing callers.
  26:    */
  27:   openOverride?: boolean;
  28:   onClickToInspect?: () => void;
  29:   children: React.ReactNode;
  30: }
  31: 
  32: const HOVER_DEBOUNCE_MS = 300;
  33: const TOUCH_AUTO_CLOSE_MS = 3000;
  34: 
  35: /**
  36:  * F6 citation overlay (Phase 2B Task 2B.1) — hover-card preview of the
  37:  * source span behind a provenance token. Click still triggers the right-
  38:  * pane Inspector view; hover shows a quick preview.
  39:  *
  40:  * I-f6-003: fully-controlled Tooltip with explicit hover/focus/touch open
  41:  * semantics. Touch tap opens the popup with a 3-second auto-close timer
  42:  * (Base UI's `closeOnClick={false}` prevents the referencePress dismiss
  43:  * from cancelling our touch-open in the same event).
  44:  */
  45: export function EvidenceTooltip({
  46:   evidenceId,
  47:   sourceUrl,
  48:   spanText,
  49:   sourceTier,
  50:   publishedDate,
  51:   side = "top",
  52:   openOverride,
  53:   onClickToInspect,
  54:   children,
  55: }: EvidenceTooltipProps) {
  56:   const [open, setOpen] = React.useState(false);
  57:   const hoverDebounceRef = React.useRef<number | null>(null);
  58:   const touchAutoCloseRef = React.useRef<number | null>(null);
  59:   const touchSessionRef = React.useRef(false);
  60: 
  61:   const clearHoverDebounce = React.useCallback(() => {
  62:     if (hoverDebounceRef.current !== null) {
  63:       window.clearTimeout(hoverDebounceRef.current);
  64:       hoverDebounceRef.current = null;
  65:     }
  66:   }, []);
  67: 
  68:   const clearTouchAutoClose = React.useCallback(() => {
  69:     if (touchAutoCloseRef.current !== null) {
  70:       window.clearTimeout(touchAutoCloseRef.current);
  71:       touchAutoCloseRef.current = null;
  72:     }
  73:   }, []);
  74: 
  75:   const handleOpenChange = React.useCallback(
  76:     (next: boolean) => {
  77:       if (!next) {
  78:         clearHoverDebounce();
  79:         clearTouchAutoClose();
  80:         touchSessionRef.current = false;
  81:       }
  82:       setOpen(next);
  83:     },
  84:     [clearHoverDebounce, clearTouchAutoClose],
  85:   );
  86: 
  87:   React.useEffect(
  88:     () => () => {
  89:       clearHoverDebounce();
  90:       clearTouchAutoClose();
  91:     },
  92:     [clearHoverDebounce, clearTouchAutoClose],
  93:   );
  94: 
  95:   const handleMouseEnter = React.useCallback(() => {
  96:     if (touchSessionRef.current) return;
  97:     clearHoverDebounce();
  98:     hoverDebounceRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
  99:       hoverDebounceRef.current = null;
 100:       setOpen(true);
 101:     }, HOVER_DEBOUNCE_MS);
 102:   }, [clearHoverDebounce]);
 103: 
 104:   const handleMouseLeave = React.useCallback(() => {
 105:     if (touchSessionRef.current) return;
 106:     clearHoverDebounce();
 107:     setOpen(false);
 108:   }, [clearHoverDebounce]);
 109: 
 110:   const handleFocus = React.useCallback(() => {
 111:     if (touchSessionRef.current) return;
 112:     setOpen(true);
 113:   }, []);
 114: 
 115:   const handleBlur = React.useCallback(() => {
 116:     if (touchSessionRef.current) return;
 117:     setOpen(false);
 118:   }, []);
 119: 
 120:   const handlePointerDown = React.useCallback(
 121:     (event: React.PointerEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
 122:       if (event.pointerType !== "touch") return;
 123:       touchSessionRef.current = true;
 124:       clearHoverDebounce();
 125:       clearTouchAutoClose();
 126:       setOpen(true);
 127:       touchAutoCloseRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
 128:         touchAutoCloseRef.current = null;
 129:         touchSessionRef.current = false;
 130:         setOpen(false);
 131:       }, TOUCH_AUTO_CLOSE_MS);
 132:     },
 133:     [clearHoverDebounce, clearTouchAutoClose],
 134:   );
 135: 
 136:   const final_open = openOverride ?? open;
 137:   return (
 138:     <Tooltip.Root open={final_open} onOpenChange={handleOpenChange}>
 139:       <Tooltip.Trigger
 140:         closeOnClick={false}
 141:         render={
 142:           <button
 143:             type="button"
 144:             onClick={onClickToInspect}
 145:             onMouseEnter={handleMouseEnter}
 146:             onMouseLeave={handleMouseLeave}
 147:             onFocus={handleFocus}
 148:             onBlur={handleBlur}
 149:             onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}
 150:             className="text-foreground bg-muted hover:bg-foreground hover:text-background mx-0.5 inline-flex min-h-[24px] cursor-pointer items-center rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-xs transition"
 151:           />
 152:         }
 153:       >
 154:         {children}
 155:       </Tooltip.Trigger>
 156:       <Tooltip.Portal>
 157:         <Tooltip.Positioner sideOffset={6} side={side}>
 158:           <Tooltip.Popup
 159:             data-testid="evidence-tooltip-popup"
 160:             className="border-border bg-background text-foreground z-50 max-w-md rounded-md border p-3 shadow-md"
 161:           >
 162:             <p className="text-muted-foreground font-mono text-[11px]">
 163:               {evidenceId}
 164:               {sourceTier && ` · tier ${sourceTier}`}
 165:             </p>
 166:             {sourceUrl && (
 167:               <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-1 truncate text-[11px]">
 168:                 {sourceUrl}
 169:               </p>
 170:             )}
 171:             {publishedDate && (
 172:               <p
 173:                 data-testid="evidence-tooltip-published"
 174:                 className="text-muted-foreground mt-1 text-[11px]"
 175:               >
 176:                 Published: {publishedDate}
 177:               </p>
 178:             )}
 179:             {spanText && (
 180:               <p className="text-foreground mt-2 text-xs leading-snug">
 181:                 &ldquo;
 182:                 {spanText.length > 240
 183:                   ? spanText.slice(0, 240) + "…"
 184:                   : spanText}
 185:                 &rdquo;
 186:               </p>
 187:             )}
 188:             <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2 text-[11px] italic">
 189:               Click to pin in Evidence pane
 190:             </p>
 191:           </Tooltip.Popup>
 192:         </Tooltip.Positioner>
 193:       </Tooltip.Portal>
 194:     </Tooltip.Root>
 195:   );
 196: }

   1: // I-f5-003 — frontend mirror of polaris_graph.generator2.provenance.
   2: 
   3: const TOKEN_RE = /^\[#ev:([a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+):(\d+)-(\d+)\]$/;
   4: 
   5: export interface ParsedToken {
   6:   raw: string;
   7:   source_id: string;
   8:   start: number;
   9:   end: number;
  10: }
  11: 
  12: export function parseProvenanceToken(token: string): ParsedToken | null {
  13:   const match = TOKEN_RE.exec(token.trim());
  14:   if (!match) return null;
  15:   return {
  16:     raw: token,
  17:     source_id: match[1],
  18:     start: parseInt(match[2], 10),
  19:     end: parseInt(match[3], 10),
  20:   };
  21: }
  22: 
  23: export function parseAllTokens(tokens: string[]): ParsedToken[] {
  24:   return tokens
  25:     .map(parseProvenanceToken)
  26:     .filter((t): t is ParsedToken => t !== null);
  27: }

codex
Initial read shows the resolver is intentionally narrow: it only slices `full_text`, looks up sources by `source_id`, and returns `quote: null` on malformed/unresolved bounds. I’m checking the interaction model now because the chip uses custom controlled state instead of the touch-specific pattern already present in `EvidenceTooltip`.

   7: +// I-p2-004 (#743): reusable citation chip + hover/focus source card.
   8: +// Chip = inline provenance marker (tier dot + mono index/id). Hover OR focus OR
   9: +// tap → source card with the EXACT cited span (untruncated) via resolveSpan.
  10: +// No-synthetic-proof: shows the span only when resolved, else an honest note.
  11: +"use client";
  12: +
  13: +import { Tooltip } from "@base-ui/react/tooltip";
  14: +import { useState } from "react";
  15: +
  16: +import { resolveSpan } from "@/lib/evidence_span";
  17: +
  18: +interface CitationChipProps {
  19: +  /** A provenance token `[#ev:<id>:<start>-<end>]`. */
  20: +  token: string;
  21: +  /** The run's evidence pool (EvidenceContract / bundle.evidencePool). */
  22: +  evidencePool: unknown;
  23: +  /** Optional display index (e.g. the nth citation in a sentence). */
  24: +  index?: number;
  25: +}
  26: +
  27: +function tierDotClass(tier: string | number | null | undefined): string {
  28: +  const t = String(tier ?? "").toUpperCase();
  29: +  if (t === "T1" || t === "1") return "bg-tier-1"; // primary evidence (red)
  30: +  if (t === "T2" || t === "2") return "bg-tier-2";
  31: +  return "bg-tier-3";
  32: +}
  33: +
  34: +export function CitationChip({
  35: +  token,
  36: +  evidencePool,
  37: +  index,
  38: +}: CitationChipProps) {
  39: +  const span = resolveSpan(token, evidencePool);
  40: +  const tier = span?.source?.tier ?? null;
  41: +  const label = span?.source?.title ?? span?.sourceId ?? token;
  42: +  // Controlled open so hover (mouse), focus (keyboard) AND tap (touch) all open
  43: +  // the source card — base-ui hover alone is mouse-only (Codex iter-1 P1).
  44: +  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  45: +
  46: +  return (
  47: +    <Tooltip.Root open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  48: +      <Tooltip.Trigger
  49: +        closeOnClick={false}
  50: +        render={
  51: +          <button
  52: +            type="button"
  53: +            data-testid="citation-chip"
  54: +            data-source-id={span?.sourceId}
  55: +            aria-label={`Source: ${label}`}
  56: +            onClick={() => setOpen((o) => !o)}
  57: +            onMouseEnter={() => setOpen(true)}
  58: +            onMouseLeave={() => setOpen(false)}
  59: +            onFocus={() => setOpen(true)}
  60: +            onBlur={() => setOpen(false)}
  61: +            className="border-border text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted focus-visible:ring-ring/70 mx-0.5 inline-flex min-h-[24px] min-w-[24px] items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded border px-1.5 align-baseline font-mono text-[11px] leading-none transition-colors focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:outline-none"
  62: +          />
  63: +        }
  64: +      >
  65: +        <span
  66: +          aria-hidden
  67: +          className={`inline-block h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full ${tierDotClass(tier)}`}
  68: +        />
  69: +        {index != null ? index : (span?.sourceId ?? "ev")}
  70: +      </Tooltip.Trigger>
  71: +      <Tooltip.Portal>
  72: +        <Tooltip.Positioner sideOffset={6}>
  73: +          <Tooltip.Popup
  74: +            data-testid="citation-source-card"
  75: +            className="border-border bg-background text-foreground z-50 max-w-md rounded-md border p-3 shadow-md"
  76: +          >
  77: +            <div className="text-muted-foreground mb-1 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-[11px]">
  78: +              <span className="text-foreground font-medium">{label}</span>
  79: +              {tier != null && <span>· tier {String(tier)}</span>}
  80: +              <span className="font-mono">
  81: +                [{span?.sourceId ?? "?"}:{span?.start ?? "?"}-{span?.end ?? "?"}
  82: +                ]
  83: +              </span>
  84: +            </div>
  85: +            {span?.quote != null ? (
  86: +              <blockquote className="text-foreground border-border max-h-48 overflow-auto border-l-2 pl-3 text-xs leading-snug italic">
  87: +                &ldquo;{span.quote}&rdquo;
  88: +              </blockquote>
  89: +            ) : (
  90: +              <p className="text-muted-foreground text-xs">
  91: +                Source span not renderable from this bundle — verify via the
  92: +                signed bundle.
  93: +              </p>
  94: +            )}
  95: +            {span?.source?.url && (
  96: +              // Non-interactive provenance text: a tooltip popup must not hold
  97: +              // interactive elements (unreachable on mouseleave + ARIA
  98: +              // antipattern). The clickable "open source" lives in the full
  99: +              // source card (#745) / Proof Replay (#756).
 100: +              <p
 101: +                className="text-muted-foreground mt-1 max-w-full truncate text-[11px]"
 102: +                title={span.source.url}
 103: +              >
 104: +                {span.source.url}
 105: +              </p>
 106: +            )}
 107: +          </Tooltip.Popup>
 108: +        </Tooltip.Positioner>
 109: +      </Tooltip.Portal>
 110: +    </Tooltip.Root>
 111: +  );
 112: +}
 113: diff --git a/web/lib/evidence_span.ts b/web/lib/evidence_span.ts
 114: new file mode 100644
 115: index 00000000..71b58e0c
 116: --- /dev/null
 117: +++ b/web/lib/evidence_span.ts
 118: @@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
 119: +// I-p2-004 (#743): the SINGLE shared resolver for provenance-token → exact
 120: +// source span. Consumed by the citation chip now and by the Proof-Replay
 121: +// inspector (#756) — one resolver boundary, no duplicate parsing.
 122: +//
 123: +// No-synthetic-proof contract (Codex brief iter-2/3): returns quote=null
 124: +// (→ honest fallback) unless the bounds are fully valid against the actual
 125: +// source body. NEVER a silently-clamped slice (that would be synthetic proof).
 126: +
 127: +import { parseProvenanceToken } from "@/lib/provenance_tokens";
 128: +
 129: +export interface EvidenceSource {
 130: +  source_id: string;
 131: +  full_text?: string | null;
 132: +  snippet?: string | null;
 133: +  title?: string | null;
 134: +  url?: string | null;
 135: +  tier?: string | number | null;
 136: +}
 137: +
 138: +export interface ResolvedSpan {
 139: +  raw: string;
 140: +  sourceId: string;
 141: +  source: EvidenceSource | null;
 142: +  start: number;
 143: +  end: number;
 144: +  /** The EXACT cited passage `full_text[start:end]`, or null when unresolved
 145: +   * (missing source / no full_text / out-of-range bounds) — never clamped. */
 146: +  quote: string | null;
 147: +}
 148: +
 149: +function sourcesOf(evidencePool: unknown): EvidenceSource[] {
 150: +  const s = (evidencePool as { sources?: unknown } | null)?.sources;
 151: +  return Array.isArray(s) ? (s as EvidenceSource[]) : [];
 152: +}
 153: +
 154: +/** Resolve a `[#ev:<id>:<start>-<end>]` token against the evidence pool.
 155: + * Returns null if the token itself is malformed; otherwise a ResolvedSpan
 156: + * whose `quote` is null unless every bound is valid against the real body. */
 157: +export function resolveSpan(
 158: +  token: string,
 159: +  evidencePool: unknown,
 160: +): ResolvedSpan | null {
 161: +  const parsed = parseProvenanceToken(token);
 162: +  if (!parsed) return null;
 163: +  // sources is an ARRAY → look up by source_id (never index).
 164: +  const source =
 165: +    sourcesOf(evidencePool).find((s) => s?.source_id === parsed.source_id) ??
 166: +    null;
 167: +  const body = source?.full_text ?? null; // exact span only from full_text
 168: +  let quote: string | null = null;
 169: +  if (
 170: +    typeof body === "string" &&
 171: +    body.length > 0 &&
 172: +    parsed.start >= 0 &&
 173: +    parsed.end <= body.length &&
 174: +    parsed.start <= parsed.end
 175: +  ) {
 176: +    quote = body.slice(parsed.start, parsed.end);
 177: +  }
 178: +  return {
 179: +    raw: token,
 180: +    sourceId: parsed.source_id,
 181: +    source,
 182: +    start: parsed.start,
 183: +    end: parsed.end,
 184: +    quote,
 185: +  };
 186: +}

 147:         // clicking into the floating element, prevent it from hiding.
 148:         // Note: it must be focusable, e.g. `tabindex="-1"`.
 149:         // We can not rely on relatedTarget to point to the correct element
 150:         // as it will only point to the shadow host of the newly focused element
 151:         // and not the element that actually has received focus if it is located
 152:         // inside a shadow root.
 153:         if ((0, _element.contains)(dataRef.current.floatingContext?.refs.floating.current, activeEl) || (0, _element.contains)(domReference, activeEl) || movedToFocusGuard) {
 154:           return;
 155:         }
 156: 
 157:         // If the next focused element is one of the triggers, do not close
 158:         // the floating element. The focus handler of that trigger will
 159:         // handle the open state.
 160:         const nextFocusedElement = relatedTarget ?? activeEl;
 161:         if ((0, _element.isTargetInsideEnabledTrigger)(nextFocusedElement, store.context.triggerElements)) {
 162:           return;
 163:         }
 164:         store.setOpen(false, (0, _createBaseUIEventDetails.createChangeEventDetails)(_reasons.REASONS.triggerFocus, nativeEvent));
 165:       });
 166:     }
 167:   }), [dataRef, store, timeout, delay]);
 168:   return React.useMemo(() => enabled ? {
 169:     reference,
 170:     trigger: reference

  28:           Verified report ({verifiedReport.sections.length} sections,{" "}
  29:           {(verifiedReport.overall_verify_pass_rate * 100).toFixed(0)}%
  30:           verified)
  31:         </CardTitle>
  32:       </CardHeader>
  33:       <CardContent className="space-y-4">
  34:         <VerdictBadge verdict={verifiedReport.pipeline_verdict} />
  35:         {verifiedReport.sections.length === 0 ? (
  36:           <p className="border-border text-muted-foreground rounded-md border border-dashed p-4 text-center">
  37:             No verified sections (pipeline verdict:{" "}
  38:             <code className="font-mono">{verifiedReport.pipeline_verdict}</code>
  39:             ).
  40:           </p>
  41:         ) : (
  42:           verifiedReport.sections.map((s) => (
  43:             <SectionPanel key={s.section_id} section={s} />
  44:           ))
  45:         )}
  46:       </CardContent>
  47:     </Card>
  48:   );
  49: }
  50: 
  51: function VerdictBadge({ verdict }: { verdict: string }) {
  52:   const isSuccess = verdict === "success";
  53:   return (
  54:     <p
  55:       data-testid="pipeline-verdict-badge"
  56:       data-state={isSuccess ? "success" : "abort"}
  57:       className={
  58:         isSuccess
  59:           ? "inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-emerald-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-emerald-900 dark:bg-emerald-950 dark:text-emerald-200"
  60:           : "inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-amber-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-amber-900 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-200"
  61:       }
  62:     >
  63:       Verdict: {verdict}
  64:     </p>
  65:   );
  66: }
  67: 
  68: function SectionPanel({ section }: { section: VerifiedReportSectionShape }) {
  69:   return (
  70:     <div
  71:       className="border-border rounded-md border p-4"
  72:       data-testid="verified-report-section"
  73:       data-section-id={section.section_id}
  74:     >
  75:       <div className="mb-2 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
  76:         <h3 className="font-medium">{section.section_id}</h3>
  77:         <span className="text-muted-foreground font-mono text-xs">
  78:           pass rate {(section.section_verify_pass_rate * 100).toFixed(0)}%
  79:         </span>
  80:       </div>
  81:       <ul className="space-y-2">
  82:         {section.verified_sentences.map((sentence, idx) => (
  83:           <SentenceItem
  84:             key={`${section.section_id}-${idx}`}
  85:             sentence={sentence}
  86:           />
  87:         ))}
  88:       </ul>
  89:     </div>
  90:   );
  91: }
  92: 
  93: function SentenceItem({ sentence }: { sentence: VerifiedSentenceShape }) {
  94:   const [showTokens, setShowTokens] = useState(false);
  95:   return (
  96:     <li
  97:       className="bg-muted/30 hover:bg-muted/60 rounded-sm border border-transparent p-2 transition-colors"
  98:       data-testid="verified-sentence"
  99:       data-verifier-pass={sentence.verifier_pass}
 100:     >
 101:       <p className="text-sm">{sentence.sentence_text}</p>
 102:       {sentence.provenance_tokens.length > 0 && (
 103:         <button
 104:           type="button"
 105:           className="text-muted-foreground focus-visible:ring-ring mt-1 inline-flex min-h-6 items-center gap-1 rounded-sm px-2 py-1 text-xs underline-offset-2 hover:underline focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:outline-none"
 106:           onClick={() => setShowTokens((v) => !v)}
 107:           data-testid="toggle-provenance-tokens"
 108:         >
 109:           {showTokens ? "Hide" : "Show"} {sentence.provenance_tokens.length}{" "}
 110:           provenance token
 111:           {sentence.provenance_tokens.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}
 112:         </button>
 113:       )}
 114:       {showTokens && (
 115:         <ul className="text-muted-foreground mt-1 ml-4 list-disc font-mono text-xs">
 116:           {sentence.provenance_tokens.map((t) => (
 117:             <li key={t}>{t}</li>
 118:           ))}
 119:         </ul>
 120:       )}
 121:     </li>
 122:   );
 123: }
